Video.summary: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong

Video.summary: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Video.summary: El Nińo is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Nińo occurs.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Video.summary: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Vicious Winds

Video.summary: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Dangerous Skies

Video.summary: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Video.summary: Witness the scary and upclose encounters with the Aquatic wildlife
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.13

Video.summary: Oh, deer! Make room for the deer crossing as these wild woodland creatures take over...your TV.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.2

Video.summary: Expect the unexpected when you venture into the wild
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.12

Video.summary: Tag along with these good samaritans on some of the most heart-pounding animal rescues.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.1

Video.summary: Sandy beaches, shallow coves, and incredible biodiversity.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.2

Video.summary: These birds are spreading their wings, with or without the ability to fly.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.7

Video.summary: Our ability to bond with any and all furry friends is what makes us human.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.3

Video.summary: The wild lures us in with its beauty and awe... and then pounces.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.8

Video.summary: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature’s deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes’ shear strength.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Shear Strength

Video.summary: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong

Video.summary: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature’s deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes’ shear strength.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Shear Strength

Video.summary: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong

Video.summary: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature’s deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes’ shear strength.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Shear Strength

Video.summary: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong

Video.summary: Storm Chaser Jaclyn Whittal anxiously experiences her first Category 4 Tropical Storm.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Video.summary: Mark hikes up Mount Washington, New Hampshire, the highest peak in the Northeastern US and battles one of the most dangerous mountains in the world at its peak intensity.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Peak Intensity

Video.summary: Firefighters race to rescue a trapped child; a truck loaded with flammable welding tanks burns out of control.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Jack-Of-All-Trades
